name: 8q12_1_CHD7_region
description: 8q12.1-q12.2 region around CHD7 (CHARGE syndrome gene). CHD7 itself is single-copy but flanked by intermediate SDs; recurrent ~4-8 Mb deletions encompassing CHD7 occur in CHARGE-spectrum patients via SD-mediated NAHR.

architecture.internal_structure: Small SD blocks flanking CHD7; rare large NAHR-mediated deletions documented in CHARGE syndrome cohort.
